personas.name: Robert Chen
personas.personality: Responsible, safety-conscious. Manages multiple buildings. Needs fast resolution for tenant-impacting issues.
personas.language_style: Professional. References building codes and SLAs. Escalates quickly on safety issues.
typical_pain_points: Elevator out of service impacting tenants

personas.name: Derek Williams
personas.personality: Highly technical, field-focused. Needs quick access to parts, manuals, and work order status.
personas.language_style: Technical. Uses unit IDs, part numbers, error codes from controller logs.
